title: System Safety; not AI Safety
description: Safety is more than just fixing technology. It's about creating systems designed to provide value while preventing harm.

title: AI Risk and Vulnerability Alliance
description: Check out the Nonprofit I cofounded to help communities identify and mitigate risks.

title: Find me on Linkedin
description: If you want to see what I follow and share, then find me there. I generally don't post because I prefer to support others' voices to reduce noise and competition.
